app_release_notes: v0.16.12 - Seating Depth Log ladder structure now matches Powder Charge Log. SD has its own Mean Radius column with real MR data, and the Composite Score column is back where it belongs (it had been mislabeled as Mean Radius, hiding the real composite from the table). Plus column-K and column-L unhide on PCL/SDL so the MR label and MR value in the hero row render. BallisticX Import sheet now carries the full set of group-quality stats (Group, Width, Height, MR, CEP, SD Radial, SD Vert, SD Horiz, Caliber) from your BallisticX session data — previously only Tag/Date/Distance/Caliber came across. Hero row label is now 'Vert SD:' (was the more ambiguous 'Vert:').
